SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-29-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-29-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF TRAVIS FIELDS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HIS WIFE MRS. FIELDS. HONORABLE PANG LY ALLOWS THE APPEARANCE FOR HER INCARCERATED HUSBAND. THE DEFENDANT DID NOT OBJECT TO THE APPAEARANCE. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT/BURGLARY DEPARTMENT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT'S WITNESS: SARGENT JESSIE FARRELL. MS FIELDS LEFT THE COURTROOM WITHOUT COMPLETING THE NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIELDS, TRAVIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT/BURGLARY DEPARTMT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
